en: But this song's awesome Mascara still holdin' on
Flyin' to another song All I do since you've been gone
Is stay up and stay out Beggin' for the bass till it's hittin' me right
Sweatin' on the dance floor under the lights To get over you
ko: 조명 아래 댄스 플로어에서 땀을 흘리며

en: Playin' my heart so I don't start to cry
DJ's workin' late, she's helpin' me try to get over you
ko: DJ가 늦게까지 일하고 있어, 나를 도와주고 있어

en: I'll be here all night I don't wanna go all natural, I want electronic
Cause if the music ever stops I might go psychotic
But if I'm never better, never be back together I'll turn the pain to pleasure
I could stay here forever Mascara still holdin' on
All I do since you've been gone
